description: Concrete execute trigger and workflow eval definitions through Milestone 4, including the must-run validation boundary pack and one pinned cryptoli real-repo workflow case.

trigger_evals.goal: Exercise execute's direct-mode trigger boundary on locally clear implementation requests.

cases.prompt: Update one stale sentence in README.md so it matches the shipped eval harness behavior, run the smallest meaningful check, and stop.
cases.why: The user wants immediate implementation and the work is still locally clear.

cases.prompt: I do not know whether this repo needs specs, tests, or a plan first. Read the code and recommend the safest next move.
cases.why: The next move is unclear, so consult owns it.

cases.prompt: Review this concrete patch and tell me whether it misses required tests sync.

trigger_evals.goal: Protect execute's plan-driven entry rules and anti-triggers.

cases.prompt: Read AGENTS.md, README.md, TODO.md, and plans/2026-04-14-phase-05-evaluation-harness.md, then execute only the next unfinished milestone from that exact plan file.
cases.why: The request is implementation now and it provides one explicit plan path.

cases.prompt: Finish the remaining evaluation-harness roadmap across several milestones, but there is no explicit plan file yet.
cases.why: Durable task state is needed before execution, so plan owns it.

cases.prompt: Is the claim that verify always runs tests actually true in the current repo?
cases.why: Concrete fact-checking and judgment belong to verify.

workflow_evals.goal: Judge direct bounded execution quality without plan-file invention.

optional.why: Use this only when skill-vs-no-skill output clarifies whether execute's direct-mode contract materially improves bounded implementation discipline.

scenario.user_request: Update one stale sentence in README.md and stop.
repo_state: The requested work is one bounded docs edit.
No explicit plan path exists or is needed.
AGENTS.md requires repo truth to be read before editing and bounded mechanical checks before stopping.

assertions: Chooses direct mode instead of inventing plan-driven execution.
Makes only the bounded change needed for the request.
Runs the smallest meaningful mechanical check.
States that no plan file was involved.
review_questions: Does the implementation stay proportional instead of broadening into unrelated cleanup?
Does the output keep the handoff to verify explicit when review is still needed?

workflow_evals.goal: Judge plan-driven execution quality for the next unfinished milestone from an explicit plan path.

optional.why: Use this only when skill-vs-no-skill output clarifies whether execute's explicit-plan-path and one-slice stop rules materially improve plan-driven execution.

scenario.user_request: Read AGENTS.md, README.md, TODO.md, and plans/2026-04-14-phase-05-evaluation-harness.md, then execute only the next unfinished milestone and update the plan before stopping.
repo_state: Milestones 1 and 2 in the plan are complete.
Milestone 3 is the next unfinished milestone.
Milestones 4 and 5 remain pending and must not be started in this session.

assertions: Uses the explicit plan path rather than guessing another plan file.
Identifies Milestone 3 as the next unfinished slice.
Implements only that slice and stops before Milestone 4.
Updates Progress, Decision Log, Discoveries, and Verification in the plan.
Reports follow-through and next-step verify handoff explicitly.
review_questions: Does the session stay in the smart working zone instead of expanding into extra milestones?
Is the updated plan resumable for the next fresh execution session?

workflow_evals.goal: Judge plan-driven execution discipline on the pinned cryptoli fixture when the harness provides an explicit plan file for a repo-truth slice.

optional.why: Use this only when skill-vs-no-skill output clarifies whether execute's explicit-plan-path and stop-after-one-slice rules improve real-repo execution discipline.

scenario.user_request: Read AGENTS.md, README.md, specs/testing-strategy.md, and plans/2026-04-20-cryptoli-agent-readiness-refresh.md in the pinned cryptoli fixture, then execute only the next unfinished milestone and update the plan before stopping.
repo_state: The pinned fixture is a three-app pnpm workspace with root repo-truth docs and layered backend plus frontend/admin tests.
The harness provides the explicit plan file and marks Milestone 1 as the next unfinished slice; later milestones remain pending.
Milestone 1 is a repo-truth sync slice that updates AGENTS.md and specs/README.md without starting later test-work.

assertions: Uses the explicit plan path rather than inventing another plan or switching to direct mode.
Implements only the next unfinished milestone and stops before later milestones.
Updates the provided plan in place with progress, discoveries, and verification notes.
Runs the smallest meaningful checks for the repo-truth slice and leaves the verify handoff explicit.
review_questions: Does the execution stay bounded and resumable on a real repo fixture instead of broadening into adjacent work?
